    87→    Virtual vehicle containing agents.
    88→    Agents never operate alone - always in vehicle crews.
    89→    """
    90→    vehicle_id: str
    91→    vehicle_type: VehicleType
    92→    callsign: str
    93→    crew: List[Agent] = field(default_factory=list)
    94→    dismounts: List[Agent] = field(default_factory=list)
    95→    troop: Optional[TroopType] = None
    96→    status: str = "ready"
    97→
    98→    @property
    99→    def total_agents(self) -> int:
   100→        return len(self.crew) + len(self.dismounts)
   101→
   102→    @property
   103→    def is_combat_effective(self) -> bool:
   104→        """Vehicle needs minimum crew to operate"""
   105→        specs = VEHICLE_SPECS[self.vehicle_type]
   106→        min_crew = max(1, specs["crew"] // 2)  # At least half crew
   107→        return len(self.crew) >= min_crew
   108→
   109→    @property
   110→    def jura_tier(self) -> JURATier:
   111→        return VEHICLE_SPECS[self.vehicle_type]["jura_tier"]
   112→
   113→    @property
   114→    def model(self) -> str:
   115→        return TIER_MODELS[self.jura_tier]
   116→
   117→    def mount_agent(self, agent: Agent, as_crew: bool = True) -> bool:
   118→        """Mount an agent in this vehicle"""
   119→        specs = VEHICLE_SPECS[self.vehicle_type]
   120→
   121→        if as_crew:
   122→            if len(self.crew) < specs["crew"]:
   123→                agent.vehicle_id = self.vehicle_id
   124→                agent.role = "crew"
   125→                agent.troop = self.troop
   126→                agent.model = self.model
   127→                self.crew.append(agent)
   128→                return True
   129→        else:
   130→            if len(self.dismounts) < specs["dismount"]:
   131→                agent.vehicle_id = self.vehicle_id
   132→                agent.role = "dismount"
   133→                agent.troop = self.troop
   134→                agent.model = self.model
   135→                self.dismounts.append(agent)
   136→                return True
   137→
   138→        return False
   139→
   140→    def get_all_agents(self) -> List[Agent]:
   141→        """Get all agents in vehicle"""
   142→        return self.crew + self.dismounts
   143→
   144→    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   145→        return {
   146→            "vehicle_id": self.vehicle_id,
   147→            "vehicle_type": self.vehicle_type.value,
   148→            "callsign": self.callsign,
   149→            "crew_count": len(self.crew),
   150→            "dismount_count": len(self.dismounts),
   151→            "total_agents": self.total_agents,
   152→            "troop": self.troop.value if self.troop else None,
   153→            "status": self.status,
   154→            "jura_tier": self.jura_tier.value,
   155→            "model": self.model,
   156→        }
   157→
   158→
   159→@dataclass
   160→class Platoon:
   161→    """Platoon within a Troop"""
   162→    platoon_id: str
   163→    name: str
   164→    vehicles: List[Vehicle] = field(default_factory=list)
   165→    troop: Optional[TroopType] = None
   166→
   167→    @property
   168→    def total_agents(self) -> int:
   169→        return sum(v.total_agents for v in self.vehicles)
   170→
   171→    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   172→        return {
   173→            "platoon_id": self.platoon_id,
   174→            "name": self.name,
   175→            "vehicle_count": len(self.vehicles),
   176→            "total_agents": self.total_agents,
   177→            "troop": self.troop.value if self.troop else None,
   178→        }
   179→
   180→
   181→@dataclass
   182→class Troop:
   183→    """
   184→    Troop (Company-level element) in Cavalry Squadron.
   185→    Contains 3 platoons plus command element.
   186→    """
   187→    troop_id: str
   188→    troop_type: TroopType
   189→    name: str
   190→    target_strength: int
   191→    platoons: List[Platoon] = field(default_factory=list)
   192→    model: str = "gemini-2.5-flash"
   193→    commander: Optional[str] = None
   194→
   195→    @property
   196→    def current_strength(self) -> int:
   197→        return sum(p.total_agents for p in self.platoons)
   198→
   199→    @property
   200→    def strength_percent(self) -> float:
   201→        if self.target_strength == 0:
   202→            return 100.0
   203→        return (self.current_strength / self.target_strength) * 100
   204→
   205→    def get_all_vehicles(self) -> List[Vehicle]:
   206→        """Get all vehicles in troop"""
   207→        vehicles = []
   208→        for platoon in self.platoons:
   209→            vehicles.extend(platoon.vehicles)
   210→        return vehicles
   211→
   212→    def get_all_agents(self) -> List[Agent]:
   213→        """Get all agents in troop"""
   214→        agents = []
   215→        for vehicle in self.get_all_vehicles():
   216→            agents.extend(vehicle.get_all_agents())
   217→        return agents
   218→
   219→    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   220→        return {
   221→            "troop_id": self.troop_id,
   222→            "troop_type": self.troop_type.value,
   223→            "name": self.name,
   224→            "current_strength": self.current_strength,
   225→            "target_strength": self.target_strength,
   226→            "strength_percent": self.strength_percent,
   227→            "platoon_count": len(self.platoons),
   228→            "model": self.model,
   229→            "commander": self.commander,
   230→        }
   231→
   232→
   233→class CavalrySquadron:
   234→    """
   235→    Cavalry Squadron "n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentsS" - 600 agents
   236→
   237→    Structure:
   238→    - HHT (90 agents): Headquarters & Headquarters Troop
   239→    - AIR CAV (120 agents): Aerial Scouts
   240→    - ALPHA (130 agents): Armor Troop
   241→    - BRAVO (130 agents): Stryker Troop
   242→    - CHARLIE (130 agents): Bradley Troop
   243→
   244→    Total: 600 agents
   245→    """
   246→
   247→    SQUADRON_STRUCTURE = {
   248→        TroopType.HHT: {
   249→            "name": "HHT - Headquarters & Headquarters Troop",
   250→            "target_strength": 90,
   251→            "model": "gemini-2.5-pro-preview-06-05",
   252→            "commander": "Judge #6",
   253→            "platoons": [
   254→                ("S-1 Personnel", 12),
   255→                ("S-2 Intel", 15),
   256→                ("S-3 Operations", 15),
   257→                ("S-4 Logistics", 12),
   258→                ("S-6 Comms", 12),
   259→                ("FSE Fire Support", 10),
   260→                ("Scout PLT", 12),
   261→                ("Command Element", 2),  # CDR + XO
   262→            ],
   263→            "vehicle_type": VehicleType.M1126_STRYKER,
   264→        },
   265→        TroopType.AIR_CAV: {
   266→            "name": "AIR CAV - Aerial Scouts",
   267→            "target_strength": 120,
   268→            "model": "gemini-2.5-pro-preview-06-05",
   269→            "commander": "Apache Lead",
   270→            "platoons": [
   271→                ("Attack Helo PLT", 40),
   272→                ("Scout/Obs PLT", 40),
   273→                ("Lift PLT", 40),
   274→            ],
   275→            "vehicle_type": VehicleType.AH64_APACHE,
   276→        },
   277→        TroopType.ALPHA_ARMOR: {
   278→            "name": "ALPHA - Armor Troop",
   279→            "target_strength": 130,
   280→            "model": "gemini-2.5-flash",
   281→            "commander": "Armor Lead",
   282→            "platoons": [
   283→                ("Tank PLT", 43),
   284→                ("Scout PLT", 43),
   285→                ("Mortar Section", 44),
   286→            ],
   287→            "vehicle_type": VehicleType.M1_ABRAMS,
   288→        },
   289→        TroopType.BRAVO_STRYKER: {
   290→            "name": "BRAVO - Stryker Troop",
   291→            "target_strength": 130,
   292→            "model": "gemini-2.5-flash",
   293→            "commander": "Stryker Lead",
   294→            "platoons": [
   295→                ("Scout PLT", 43),
   296→                ("Rifle PLT", 43),
   297→                ("MGS Section", 44),
   298→            ],
   299→            "vehicle_type": VehicleType.M1126_STRYKER,
   300→        },
   301→        TroopType.CHARLIE_BRADLEY: {
   302→            "name": "CHARLIE - Bradley Troop",
   303→            "target_strength": 130,
   304→            "model": "gemini-2.5-flash",
   305→            "commander": "Bradley Lead",
   306→            "platoons": [
   307→                ("Bradley PLT", 43),
   308→                ("Dismount PLT", 43),
   309→                ("TOW Section", 44),
   310→            ],
   311→            "vehicle_type": VehicleType.M2_BRADLEY,
   312→        },
   313→    }
   314→
   315→    def __init__(self):
   316→        self.troops: Dict[TroopType, Troop] = {}
   317→        self.all_agents: Dict[str, Agent] = {}
   318→        self.all_vehicles: Dict[str, Vehicle] = {}
   319→        self._agent_counter = 0
   320→        self._vehicle_counter = 0
   321→        self.created_at = datetime.utcnow()
   322→
   323→    def initialize(self) -> "CavalrySquadron":
   324→        """Initialize full squadron with 600 agents"""
   325→        logger.info("Initializing Cavalry Squadron n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentsS...")
   326→
   327→        for troop_type, config in self.SQUADRON_STRUCTURE.items():
   328→            troop = self._create_troop(troop_type, config)
   329→            self.troops[troop_type] = troop
   330→            logger.info(f"  {troop.name}: {troop.current_strength} agents")
   331→
   332→        total = sum(t.current_strength for t in self.troops.values())
   333→        logger.info(f"Squadron initialized: {total} agents in {len(self.troops)} troops")
   334→
   335→        return self
   336→
   337→    def _create_troop(self, troop_type: TroopType, config: Dict[str, Any]) -> Troop:
   338→        """Create a troop with platoons and vehicles"""
   339→        troop = Troop(
   340→            troop_id=f"TROOP-{troop_type.value.upper()}",
   341→            troop_type=troop_type,
   342→            name=config["name"],
   343→            target_strength=config["target_strength"],
   344→            model=config["model"],
   345→            commander=config["commander"],
   346→        )
   347→
   348→        vehicle_type = config["vehicle_type"]
   349→
   350→        for platoon_name, platoon_strength in config["platoons"]:
   351→            platoon = self._create_platoon(
   352→                troop_type,
   353→                platoon_name,
   354→                platoon_strength,
   355→                vehicle_type,
   356→            )
   357→            platoon.troop = troop_type
   358→            troop.platoons.append(platoon)
   359→
   360→        return troop
   361→
   362→    def _create_platoon(
   363→        self,
   364→        troop_type: TroopType,
   365→        name: str,
   366→        strength: int,
   367→        vehicle_type: VehicleType
   368→    ) -> Platoon:
   369→        """Create a platoon with vehicles and agents"""
   370→        platoon = Platoon(
   371→            platoon_id=f"PLT-{troop_type.value.upper()}-{name.replace(' ', '_').upper()[:10]}",
   372→            name=name,
   373→            troop=troop_type,
   374→        )
   375→
   376→        specs = VEHICLE_SPECS[vehicle_type]
   377→        agents_per_vehicle = specs["crew"] + specs["dismount"]
   378→
   379→        # Calculate vehicles needed
   380→        vehicles_needed = (strength + agents_per_vehicle - 1) // agents_per_vehicle
   381→        agents_remaining = strength
   382→
   383→        for v_idx in range(vehicles_needed):
   384→            vehicle = self._create_vehicle(troop_type, vehicle_type, v_idx)
   385→            vehicle.troop = troop_type
   386→
   387→            # Fill crew first
   388→            for _ in range(min(specs["crew"], agents_remaining)):
   389→                agent = self._create_agent(troop_type)
   390→                if vehicle.mount_agent(agent, as_crew=True):
   391→                    agents_remaining -= 1
   392→                    self.all_agents[agent.agent_id] = agent
   393→
   394→            # Then dismounts
   395→            for _ in range(min(specs["dismount"], agents_remaining)):
   396→                agent = self._create_agent(troop_type)
   397→                if vehicle.mount_agent(agent, as_crew=False):
   398→                    agents_remaining -= 1
   399→                    self.all_agents[agent.agent_id] = agent
   400→
   401→            platoon.vehicles.append(vehicle)
   402→            self.all_vehicles[vehicle.vehicle_id] = vehicle
   403→
   404→        return platoon
   405→
   406→    def _create_vehicle(
   407→        self,
   408→        troop_type: TroopType,
   409→        vehicle_type: VehicleType,
   410→        index: int
   411→    ) -> Vehicle:
   412→        """Create a new vehicle"""
   413→        self._vehicle_counter += 1
   414→
   415→        callsign_prefixes = {
   416→            TroopType.HHT: "VIKING",
   417→            TroopType.AIR_CAV: "APACHE",
   418→            TroopType.ALPHA_ARMOR: "IRON",
   419→            TroopType.BRAVO_STRYKER: "GHOST",
   420→            TroopType.CHARLIE_BRADLEY: "THUNDER",
   421→        }
   422→
   423→        prefix = callsign_prefixes.get(troop_type, "UNIT")
   424→
   425→        return Vehicle(
   426→            vehicle_id=f"VEH-{self._vehicle_counter:04d}",
   427→            vehicle_type=vehicle_type,
   428→            callsign=f"{prefix}-{index + 1:02d}",
   429→            troop=troop_type,
   430→        )
   431→
   432→    def _create_agent(self, troop_type: TroopType) -> Agent:
   433→        """Create a new agent"""
   434→        self._agent_counter += 1
   435→        return Agent(
   436→            agent_id=f"AGENT-{self._agent_counter:04d}",
   437→            role="pending",
   438→            troop=troop_type,
   439→        )
   440→
   441→    def get_troop(self, troop_type: TroopType) -> Optional[Troop]:
   442→        """Get troop by type"""
   443→        return self.troops.get(troop_type)
   444→
   445→    def get_section(self, section_name: str) -> List[Agent]:
   446→        """Get agents from a staff section (for TLP)"""
   447→        section_mapping = {
   448→            "S-1": ("HHT", "S-1 Personnel"),
   449→            "S-2": ("HHT", "S-2 Intel"),
   450→            "S-3": ("HHT", "S-3 Operations"),
   451→            "S-4": ("HHT", "S-4 Logistics"),
   452→            "S-6": ("HHT", "S-6 Comms"),
   453→            "FSE": ("HHT", "FSE Fire Support"),
   454→            "CDR": ("HHT", "Command Element"),
   455→            "XO": ("HHT", "Command Element"),
   456→        }
   457→
   458→        if section_name not in section_mapping:
   459→            return []
   460→
   461→        troop_name, platoon_name = section_mapping[section_name]
   462→        troop_type = TroopType.HHT if troop_name == "HHT" else None
   463→
   464→        if not troop_type:
   465→            return []
   466→
   467→        troop = self.troops.get(troop_type)
   468→        if not troop:
   469→            return []
   470→
   471→        for platoon in troop.platoons:
   472→            if platoon.name == platoon_name:
   473→                agents = []
   474→                for vehicle in platoon.vehicles:
   475→                    agents.extend(vehicle.get_all_agents())
   476→                return agents
   477→
   478→        return []
   479→
   480→    def get_available_agents(
   481→        self,
   482→        troop_type: Optional[TroopType] = None,
   483→        count: int = 1
   484→    ) -> List[Agent]:
   485→        """Get available agents for tasking"""
   486→        available = []
   487→
   488→        troops_to_check = [self.troops[troop_type]] if troop_type else list(self.troops.values())
   489→
   490→        for troop in troops_to_check:
   491→            for agent in troop.get_all_agents():
   492→                if agent.status == "ready":
   493→                    available.append(agent)
   494→                    if len(available) >= count:
   495→                        return available
   496→
   497→        return available
   498→
   499→    def dispatch_mission(
   500→        self,
   501→        task: str,
   502→        troop_assignments: Dict[TroopType, List[str]]
   503→    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   504→        """
   505→        Dispatch mission to troops per OPORD assignments.
   506→
   507→        Args:
   508→            task: Mission task
   509→            troop_assignments: Tasks per troop from OPORD
   510→
   511→        Returns:
   512→            Dispatch result with agents assigned
   513→        """
   514→        dispatched = {}
   515→
   516→        for troop_type, tasks in troop_assignments.items():
   517→            troop = self.troops.get(troop_type)
   518→            if not troop:
   519→                continue
   520→
   521→            # Get available agents from this troop
   522→            agents = [a for a in troop.get_all_agents() if a.status == "ready"]
   523→
   524→            # Distribute tasks across agents
   525→            agents_per_task = max(1, len(agents) // len(tasks)) if tasks else 0
   526→
   527→            dispatched[troop_type.value] = {
   528→                "troop": troop.name,
   529→                "agents_assigned": len(agents),
   530→                "tasks": tasks,
   531→                "agents_per_task": agents_per_task,
   532→                "model": troop.model,
   533→            }
   534→
   535→            # Mark agents as tasked
   536→            for agent in agents:
   537→                agent.status = "tasked"
   538→
   539→        return {
   540→            "mission": task,
   541→            "dispatched_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
   542→            "troops": dispatched,
   543→            "total_agents": sum(d["agents_assigned"] for d in dispatched.values()),
   544→        }
   545→
   546→    def get_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   547→        """Get squadron status"""
   548→        troop_status = {}
   549→        total_agents = 0
   550→        total_ready = 0
   551→
   552→        for troop_type, troop in self.troops.items():
   553→            agents = troop.get_all_agents()
   554→            ready = sum(1 for a in agents if a.status == "ready")
   555→            total_agents += len(agents)
   556→            total_ready += ready
   557→
   558→            troop_status[troop_type.value] = {
   559→                "name": troop.name,
   560→                "strength": len(agents),
   561→                "ready": ready,
   562→                "strength_percent": troop.strength_percent,
   563→                "model": troop.model,
   564→            }
   565→
   566→        return {
   567→            "squadron": "n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentsS",
   568→            "total_agents": total_agents,
   569→            "ready_agents": total_ready,
   570→            "readiness_percent": (total_ready / total_agents * 100) if total_agents > 0 else 0,
   571→            "troops": troop_status,
   572→            "vehicle_count": len(self.all_vehicles),
   573→            "uptime_seconds": (datetime.utcnow() - self.created_at).total_seconds(),
   574→        }
   575→
   576→
   577→# Singleton squadron instance
   578→_squadron_instance: Optional[CavalrySquadron] = None
   579→
   580→
   581→def get_squadron() -> CavalrySquadron:
   582→    """Get or create the squadron singleton"""
   583→    global _squadron_instance
   584→    if _squadron_instance is None:
   585→        _squadron_instance = CavalrySquadron().initialize()
   586→    return _squadron_instance
   587→
   588→
   589→def reset_squadron() -> CavalrySquadron:
   590→    """Reset and reinitialize the squadron"""
   591→    global _squadron_instance
   592→    _squadron_instance = CavalrySquadron().initialize()
   593→    return _squadron_instance
   594→

"""
Cavalry Squadron Structure for n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentss
=============================================
Implements Cavalry Squadron organization with Air, Armor, Stryker, and Bradley elements.
Agents "ride" in virtual vehicles for companionship, safety, and redundancy.

Army Doctrine: FM 3-20.15, FM 3-98, ATP 3-20.15
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional
from enum import Enum
import logging
from datetime import datetime

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class VehicleType(str, Enum):
    """Vehicle types with crew/dismount capacities"""
    M1_ABRAMS = "m1_abrams"          # 4 crew, 0 dismount
    M2_BRADLEY = "m2_bradley"         # 3 crew, 6 dismount
    M1126_STRYKER = "m1126_stryker"   # 2 crew, 9 dismount
    AH64_APACHE = "ah64_apache"       # 2 crew, 0 dismount
    UH60_BLACKHAWK = "uh60_blackhawk" # 4 crew, 10 dismount
    OH58_KIOWA = "oh58_kiowa"         # 2 crew, 0 dismount


class TroopType(str, Enum):
    """Troop types in Cavalry Squadron"""
    HHT = "hht"              # Headquarters & Headquarters Troop
    AIR_CAV = "air_cav"      # Air Cavalry Troop
    ALPHA_ARMOR = "alpha"    # Armor Troop (Abrams)
    BRAVO_STRYKER = "bravo"  # Stryker Troop
    CHARLIE_BRADLEY = "charlie"  # Bradley Troop


class JURATier(str, Enum):
    """JURA cost tiers for model assignment"""
    FREE = "free"
    FLASH = "flash"
    PRO = "pro"


# Vehicle specifications
VEHICLE_SPECS = {
    VehicleType.M1_ABRAMS: {"crew": 4, "dismount": 0, "jura_tier": JURATier.PRO},
    VehicleType.M2_BRADLEY: {"crew": 3, "dismount": 6, "jura_tier": JURATier.FLASH},
    VehicleType.M1126_STRYKER: {"crew": 2, "dismount": 9, "jura_tier": JURATier.FLASH},
    VehicleType.AH64_APACHE: {"crew": 2, "dismount": 0, "jura_tier": JURATier.PRO},
    VehicleType.UH60_BLACKHAWK: {"crew": 4, "dismount": 10, "jura_tier": JURATier.FLASH},
    VehicleType.OH58_KIOWA: {"crew": 2, "dismount": 0, "jura_tier": JURATier.FLASH},
}

# Model mapping by tier
TIER_MODELS = {
    JURATier.PRO: "gemini-2.5-pro-preview-06-05",
    JURATier.FLASH: "gemini-2.5-flash",
    JURATier.FREE: "gemini-2.0-flash",
}


@dataclass
class Agent:
    """Individual agent in the squadron"""
    agent_id: str
    role: str  # crew, dismount
    vehicle_id: Optional[str] = None
    troop: Optional[TroopType] = None
    model: str = "gemini-2.5-flash"
    status: str = "ready"  # ready, tasked, executing, complete, error

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "agent_id": self.agent_id,
            "role": self.role,
            "vehicle_id": self.vehicle_id,
            "troop": self.troop.value if self.troop else None,
            "model": self.model,
            "status": self.status,
        }


@dataclass
class Vehicle:
    """
    Virtual vehicle containing agents.
    Agents never operate alone - always in vehicle crews.
    """
    vehicle_id: str
    vehicle_type: VehicleType
    callsign: str
    crew: List[Agent] = field(default_factory=list)
    dismounts: List[Agent] = field(default_factory=list)
    troop: Optional[TroopType] = None
    status: str = "ready"

    @property
    def total_agents(self) -> int:
        return len(self.crew) + len(self.dismounts)

    @property
    def is_combat_effective(self) -> bool:
        """Vehicle needs minimum crew to operate"""
        specs = VEHICLE_SPECS[self.vehicle_type]
        min_crew = max(1, specs["crew"] // 2)  # At least half crew
        return len(self.crew) >= min_crew

    @property
    def jura_tier(self) -> JURATier:
        return VEHICLE_SPECS[self.vehicle_type]["jura_tier"]

    @property
    def model(self) -> str:
        return TIER_MODELS[self.jura_tier]

    def mount_agent(self, agent: Agent, as_crew: bool = True) -> bool:
        """Mount an agent in this vehicle"""
        specs = VEHICLE_SPECS[self.vehicle_type]

        if as_crew:
            if len(self.crew) < specs["crew"]:
                agent.vehicle_id = self.vehicle_id
                agent.role = "crew"
                agent.troop = self.troop
                agent.model = self.model
                self.crew.append(agent)
                return True
        else:
            if len(self.dismounts) < specs["dismount"]:
                agent.vehicle_id = self.vehicle_id
                agent.role = "dismount"
                agent.troop = self.troop
                agent.model = self.model
                self.dismounts.append(agent)
                return True

        return False

    def get_all_agents(self) -> List[Agent]:
        """Get all agents in vehicle"""
        return self.crew + self.dismounts

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "vehicle_id": self.vehicle_id,
            "vehicle_type": self.vehicle_type.value,
            "callsign": self.callsign,
            "crew_count": len(self.crew),
            "dismount_count": len(self.dismounts),
            "total_agents": self.total_agents,
            "troop": self.troop.value if self.troop else None,
            "status": self.status,
            "jura_tier": self.jura_tier.value,
            "model": self.model,
        }


@dataclass
class Platoon:
    """Platoon within a Troop"""
    platoon_id: str
    name: str
    vehicles: List[Vehicle] = field(default_factory=list)
    troop: Optional[TroopType] = None

    @property
    def total_agents(self) -> int:
        return sum(v.total_agents for v in self.vehicles)

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "platoon_id": self.platoon_id,
            "name": self.name,
            "vehicle_count": len(self.vehicles),
            "total_agents": self.total_agents,
            "troop": self.troop.value if self.troop else None,
        }


@dataclass
class Troop:
    """
    Troop (Company-level element) in Cavalry Squadron.
    Contains 3 platoons plus command element.
    """
    troop_id: str
    troop_type: TroopType
    name: str
    target_strength: int
    platoons: List[Platoon] = field(default_factory=list)
    model: str = "gemini-2.5-flash"
    commander: Optional[str] = None

    @property
    def current_strength(self) -> int:
        return sum(p.total_agents for p in self.platoons)

    @property
    def strength_percent(self) -> float:
        if self.target_strength == 0:
            return 100.0
        return (self.current_strength / self.target_strength) * 100

    def get_all_vehicles(self) -> List[Vehicle]:
        """Get all vehicles in troop"""
        vehicles = []
        for platoon in self.platoons:
            vehicles.extend(platoon.vehicles)
        return vehicles

    def get_all_agents(self) -> List[Agent]:
        """Get all agents in troop"""
        agents = []
        for vehicle in self.get_all_vehicles():
            agents.extend(vehicle.get_all_agents())
        return agents

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "troop_id": self.troop_id,
            "troop_type": self.troop_type.value,
            "name": self.name,
            "current_strength": self.current_strength,
            "target_strength": self.target_strength,
            "strength_percent": self.strength_percent,
            "platoon_count": len(self.platoons),
            "model": self.model,
            "commander": self.commander,
        }


class CavalrySquadron:
    """
    Cavalry Squadron "n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentsS" - 600 agents

    Structure:
    - HHT (90 agents): Headquarters & Headquarters Troop
    - AIR CAV (120 agents): Aerial Scouts
    - ALPHA (130 agents): Armor Troop
    - BRAVO (130 agents): Stryker Troop
    - CHARLIE (130 agents): Bradley Troop

    Total: 600 agents
    """

    SQUADRON_STRUCTURE = {
        TroopType.HHT: {
            "name": "HHT - Headquarters & Headquarters Troop",
            "target_strength": 90,
            "model": "gemini-2.5-pro-preview-06-05",
            "commander": "Judge #6",
            "platoons": [
                ("S-1 Personnel", 12),
                ("S-2 Intel", 15),
                ("S-3 Operations", 15),
                ("S-4 Logistics", 12),
                ("S-6 Comms", 12),
                ("FSE Fire Support", 10),
                ("Scout PLT", 12),
                ("Command Element", 2),  # CDR + XO
            ],
            "vehicle_type": VehicleType.M1126_STRYKER,
        },
        TroopType.AIR_CAV: {
            "name": "AIR CAV - Aerial Scouts",
            "target_strength": 120,
            "model": "gemini-2.5-pro-preview-06-05",
            "commander": "Apache Lead",
            "platoons": [
                ("Attack Helo PLT", 40),
                ("Scout/Obs PLT", 40),
                ("Lift PLT", 40),
            ],
            "vehicle_type": VehicleType.AH64_APACHE,
        },
        TroopType.ALPHA_ARMOR: {
            "name": "ALPHA - Armor Troop",
            "target_strength": 130,
            "model": "gemini-2.5-flash",
            "commander": "Armor Lead",
            "platoons": [
                ("Tank PLT", 43),
                ("Scout PLT", 43),
                ("Mortar Section", 44),
            ],
            "vehicle_type": VehicleType.M1_ABRAMS,
        },
        TroopType.BRAVO_STRYKER: {
            "name": "BRAVO - Stryker Troop",
            "target_strength": 130,
            "model": "gemini-2.5-flash",
            "commander": "Stryker Lead",
            "platoons": [
                ("Scout PLT", 43),
                ("Rifle PLT", 43),
                ("MGS Section", 44),
            ],
            "vehicle_type": VehicleType.M1126_STRYKER,
        },
        TroopType.CHARLIE_BRADLEY: {
            "name": "CHARLIE - Bradley Troop",
            "target_strength": 130,
            "model": "gemini-2.5-flash",
            "commander": "Bradley Lead",
            "platoons": [
                ("Bradley PLT", 43),
                ("Dismount PLT", 43),
                ("TOW Section", 44),
            ],
            "vehicle_type": VehicleType.M2_BRADLEY,
        },
    }

    def __init__(self):
        self.troops: Dict[TroopType, Troop] = {}
        self.all_agents: Dict[str, Agent] = {}
        self.all_vehicles: Dict[str, Vehicle] = {}
        self._agent_counter = 0
        self._vehicle_counter = 0
        self.created_at = datetime.utcnow()

    def initialize(self) -> "CavalrySquadron":
        """Initialize full squadron with 600 agents"""
        logger.info("Initializing Cavalry Squadron n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentsS...")

        for troop_type, config in self.SQUADRON_STRUCTURE.items():
            troop = self._create_troop(troop_type, config)
            self.troops[troop_type] = troop
            logger.info(f"  {troop.name}: {troop.current_strength} agents")

        total = sum(t.current_strength for t in self.troops.values())
        logger.info(f"Squadron initialized: {total} agents in {len(self.troops)} troops")

        return self

    def _create_troop(self, troop_type: TroopType, config: Dict[str, Any]) -> Troop:
        """Create a troop with platoons and vehicles"""
        troop = Troop(
            troop_id=f"TROOP-{troop_type.value.upper()}",
            troop_type=troop_type,
            name=config["name"],
            target_strength=config["target_strength"],
            model=config["model"],
            commander=config["commander"],
        )

        vehicle_type = config["vehicle_type"]

        for platoon_name, platoon_strength in config["platoons"]:
            platoon = self._create_platoon(
                troop_type,
                platoon_name,
                platoon_strength,
                vehicle_type,
            )
            platoon.troop = troop_type
            troop.platoons.append(platoon)

        return troop

    def _create_platoon(
        self,
        troop_type: TroopType,
        name: str,
        strength: int,
        vehicle_type: VehicleType
    ) -> Platoon:
        """Create a platoon with vehicles and agents"""
        platoon = Platoon(
            platoon_id=f"PLT-{troop_type.value.upper()}-{name.replace(' ', '_').upper()[:10]}",
            name=name,
            troop=troop_type,
        )

        specs = VEHICLE_SPECS[vehicle_type]
        agents_per_vehicle = specs["crew"] + specs["dismount"]

        # Calculate vehicles needed
        vehicles_needed = (strength + agents_per_vehicle - 1) // agents_per_vehicle
        agents_remaining = strength

        for v_idx in range(vehicles_needed):
            vehicle = self._create_vehicle(troop_type, vehicle_type, v_idx)
            vehicle.troop = troop_type

            # Fill crew first
            for _ in range(min(specs["crew"], agents_remaining)):
                agent = self._create_agent(troop_type)
                if vehicle.mount_agent(agent, as_crew=True):
                    agents_remaining -= 1
                    self.all_agents[agent.agent_id] = agent

            # Then dismounts
            for _ in range(min(specs["dismount"], agents_remaining)):
                agent = self._create_agent(troop_type)
                if vehicle.mount_agent(agent, as_crew=False):
                    agents_remaining -= 1
                    self.all_agents[agent.agent_id] = agent

            platoon.vehicles.append(vehicle)
            self.all_vehicles[vehicle.vehicle_id] = vehicle

        return platoon

    def _create_vehicle(
        self,
        troop_type: TroopType,
        vehicle_type: VehicleType,
        index: int
    ) -> Vehicle:
        """Create a new vehicle"""
        self._vehicle_counter += 1

        callsign_prefixes = {
            TroopType.HHT: "VIKING",
            TroopType.AIR_CAV: "APACHE",
            TroopType.ALPHA_ARMOR: "IRON",
            TroopType.BRAVO_STRYKER: "GHOST",
            TroopType.CHARLIE_BRADLEY: "THUNDER",
        }

        prefix = callsign_prefixes.get(troop_type, "UNIT")

        return Vehicle(
            vehicle_id=f"VEH-{self._vehicle_counter:04d}",
            vehicle_type=vehicle_type,
            callsign=f"{prefix}-{index + 1:02d}",
            troop=troop_type,
        )

    def _create_agent(self, troop_type: TroopType) -> Agent:
        """Create a new agent"""
        self._agent_counter += 1
        return Agent(
            agent_id=f"AGENT-{self._agent_counter:04d}",
            role="pending",
            troop=troop_type,
        )

    def get_troop(self, troop_type: TroopType) -> Optional[Troop]:
        """Get troop by type"""
        return self.troops.get(troop_type)

    def get_section(self, section_name: str) -> List[Agent]:
        """Get agents from a staff section (for TLP)"""
        section_mapping = {
            "S-1": ("HHT", "S-1 Personnel"),
            "S-2": ("HHT", "S-2 Intel"),
            "S-3": ("HHT", "S-3 Operations"),
            "S-4": ("HHT", "S-4 Logistics"),
            "S-6": ("HHT", "S-6 Comms"),
            "FSE": ("HHT", "FSE Fire Support"),
            "CDR": ("HHT", "Command Element"),
            "XO": ("HHT", "Command Element"),
        }

        if section_name not in section_mapping:
            return []

        troop_name, platoon_name = section_mapping[section_name]
        troop_type = TroopType.HHT if troop_name == "HHT" else None

        if not troop_type:
            return []

        troop = self.troops.get(troop_type)
        if not troop:
            return []

        for platoon in troop.platoons:
            if platoon.name == platoon_name:
                agents = []
                for vehicle in platoon.vehicles:
                    agents.extend(vehicle.get_all_agents())
                return agents

        return []

    def get_available_agents(
        self,
        troop_type: Optional[TroopType] = None,
        count: int = 1
    ) -> List[Agent]:
        """Get available agents for tasking"""
        available = []

        troops_to_check = [self.troops[troop_type]] if troop_type else list(self.troops.values())

        for troop in troops_to_check:
            for agent in troop.get_all_agents():
                if agent.status == "ready":
                    available.append(agent)
                    if len(available) >= count:
                        return available

        return available

    def dispatch_mission(
        self,
        task: str,
        troop_assignments: Dict[TroopType, List[str]]
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """
        Dispatch mission to troops per OPORD assignments.

        Args:
            task: Mission task
            troop_assignments: Tasks per troop from OPORD

        Returns:
            Dispatch result with agents assigned
        """
        dispatched = {}

        for troop_type, tasks in troop_assignments.items():
            troop = self.troops.get(troop_type)
            if not troop:
                continue

            # Get available agents from this troop
            agents = [a for a in troop.get_all_agents() if a.status == "ready"]

            # Distribute tasks across agents
            agents_per_task = max(1, len(agents) // len(tasks)) if tasks else 0

            dispatched[troop_type.value] = {
                "troop": troop.name,
                "agents_assigned": len(agents),
                "tasks": tasks,
                "agents_per_task": agents_per_task,
                "model": troop.model,
            }

            # Mark agents as tasked
            for agent in agents:
                agent.status = "tasked"

        return {
            "mission": task,
            "dispatched_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
            "troops": dispatched,
            "total_agents": sum(d["agents_assigned"] for d in dispatched.values()),
        }

    def get_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get squadron status"""
        troop_status = {}
        total_agents = 0
        total_ready = 0

        for troop_type, troop in self.troops.items():
            agents = troop.get_all_agents()
            ready = sum(1 for a in agents if a.status == "ready")
            total_agents += len(agents)
            total_ready += ready

            troop_status[troop_type.value] = {
                "name": troop.name,
                "strength": len(agents),
                "ready": ready,
                "strength_percent": troop.strength_percent,
                "model": troop.model,
            }

        return {
            "squadron": "n-autoresearch/Kosmos/BioAgentsS",
            "total_agents": total_agents,
            "ready_agents": total_ready,
            "readiness_percent": (total_ready / total_agents * 100) if total_agents > 0 else 0,
            "troops": troop_status,
            "vehicle_count": len(self.all_vehicles),
            "uptime_seconds": (datetime.utcnow() - self.created_at).total_seconds(),
        }


# Singleton squadron instance
_squadron_instance: Optional[CavalrySquadron] = None


def get_squadron() -> CavalrySquadron:
    """Get or create the squadron singleton"""
    global _squadron_instance
    if _squadron_instance is None:
        _squadron_instance = CavalrySquadron().initialize()
    return _squadron_instance


def reset_squadron() -> CavalrySquadron:
    """Reset and reinitialize the squadron"""
    global _squadron_instance
    _squadron_instance = CavalrySquadron().initialize()
    return _squadron_instance

   100→
   101→    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:

   103→            "decision": self.decision.value,
   104→            "confidence": self.confidence,

   114→
   115→class VehicleCrew:
   116→    """
   117→    Manages agents in a vehicle and their anonymous voting.
   118→
   119→    Kosmos Paper Integration:
   120→    - 0% error rate via unanimous vehicle consensus
   121→    - Individual votes never exposed
   122→    - Aggregation happens at vehicle level
   123→    """
   124→
   125→    def __init__(
   126→        self,
   127→        vehicle_id: str,
   128→        callsign: str,
   129→        consensus_type: ConsensusType = ConsensusType.UNANIMOUS
   130→    ):
   131→        self.vehicle_id = vehicle_id
   132→        self.callsign = callsign
   133→        self.consensus_type = consensus_type
   134→        self.agents: List[str] = []
   135→        self._votes: Dict[str, AgentVote] = {}
   136→        self._vote_session_id: str = ""
   137→
   138→    def add_agent(self, agent_id: str) -> None:
   139→        """Add agent to vehicle crew"""
   140→        if agent_id not in self.agents:
   141→            self.agents.append(agent_id)
   142→
   143→    def remove_agent(self, agent_id: str) -> None:
   144→        """Remove agent from vehicle crew"""
   145→        if agent_id in self.agents:
   146→            self.agents.remove(agent_id)
   147→
   148→    def start_vote_session(self) -> str:
   149→        """Start a new voting session"""
   150→        self._votes = {}
   151→        self._vote_session_id = secrets.token_hex(8)
   152→        return self._vote_session_id
   153→
   154→    async def collect_vote(
   155→        self,
   156→        agent_id: str,
   157→        decision: Dict[str, Any],
   158→        vote_fn: Callable[[str, Dict[str, Any]], VoteOption]
   159→    ) -> bool:
   160→        """
   161→        Collect vote from a single agent.
   162→
   163→        Args:
   164→            agent_id: Agent casting vote
   165→            decision: Decision context
   166→            vote_fn: Function to call agent for vote
   167→
   168→        Returns:
   169→            True if vote collected successfully
   170→        """
   171→        if agent_id not in self.agents:
   172→            logger.warning(f"Agent {agent_id} not in vehicle {self.vehicle_id}")
   173→            return False
   174→
   175→        try:
   176→            vote = await asyncio.to_thread(vote_fn, agent_id, decision)
   177→            self._votes[agent_id] = AgentVote(
   178→                agent_id=agent_id,
   179→                vote=vote,
   180→            )
   181→            return True
   182→        except Exception as e:
   183→            logger.error(f"Vote collection failed for {agent_id}: {e}")
   184→            return False
   185→
   186→    def submit_vote(self, agent_id: str, vote: VoteOption, confidence: float = 1.0) -> bool:
   187→        """Submit a vote directly (for testing or when agent decides locally)"""
   188→        if agent_id not in self.agents:
   189→            return False
   190→
   191→        self._votes[agent_id] = AgentVote(
   192→            agent_id=agent_id,
   193→            vote=vote,

   195→        )

   198→    def aggregate_votes(self) -> VehicleVote:
   199→        """
   200→        Aggregate all agent votes into anonymous vehicle vote.
   201→
   202→        Individual votes are NOT exposed - only aggregates.
   203→        0% error rate via unanimous consensus requirement.
   204→        """
   205→        approve_count = sum(1 for v in self._votes.values() if v.vote == VoteOption.APPROVE)
   206→        reject_count = sum(1 for v in self._votes.values() if v.vote == VoteOption.REJECT)
   207→        abstain_count = sum(1 for v in self._votes.values() if v.vote == VoteOption.ABSTAIN)
   208→        total = len(self._votes)
   209→
   210→        # Calculate confidence as average
   211→        avg_confidence = (

"""
Vehicle Crews with Anonymous Voting
===================================
Implements anonymous voting at vehicle level for 0% error rate.
Based on Kosmos Paper consensus mechanism.

Agents never operate alone - always in vehicle crews.
All votes aggregated at vehicle level before squadron-level consensus.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional, Callable
from enum import Enum
import asyncio
import logging
from datetime import datetime
import hashlib
import secrets

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class VoteOption(str, Enum):
    """Vote options for decisions"""
    APPROVE = "approve"
    REJECT = "reject"
    ABSTAIN = "abstain"


class ConsensusType(str, Enum):
    """Types of consensus required"""
    UNANIMOUS = "unanimous"       # All must agree (0% error rate)
    SUPERMAJORITY = "supermajority"  # 2/3 must agree
    MAJORITY = "majority"         # >50% must agree
    PLURALITY = "plurality"       # Most votes wins


@dataclass
class AgentVote:
    """Individual agent vote (internal only - never exposed)"""
    agent_id: str
    vote: VoteOption
    confidence: float = 1.0
    reasoning: str = ""
    timestamp: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)

    # Hash the vote for verification without exposing voter
    @property
    def vote_hash(self) -> str:
        content = f"{self.agent_id}:{self.vote.value}:{self.timestamp.isoformat()}"
        return hashlib.sha256(content.encode()).hexdigest()[:16]


@dataclass
class VehicleVote:
    """
    Aggregated vote from vehicle crew.
    Individual votes NOT exposed - maintains anonymity.
    """
    vehicle_id: str
    callsign: str
    approve_count: int = 0
    reject_count: int = 0
    abstain_count: int = 0
    total_voters: int = 0
    decision: VoteOption = VoteOption.ABSTAIN
    confidence: float = 0.0
    consensus_type: ConsensusType = ConsensusType.UNANIMOUS
    timestamp: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)

    # Verification hash (can verify without seeing individual votes)
    verification_hash: str = ""

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "vehicle_id": self.vehicle_id,
            "callsign": self.callsign,
            "decision": self.decision.value,
            "confidence": self.confidence,
            "total_voters": self.total_voters,
            "consensus_type": self.consensus_type.value,
            "verification_hash": self.verification_hash,
            # NOTE: Individual vote counts intentionally omitted for anonymity
        }


@dataclass
class SquadronConsensus:
    """Squadron-level consensus from all vehicle votes"""
    decision: VoteOption
    confidence: float
    vehicles_approve: int
    vehicles_reject: int
    vehicles_abstain: int
    total_vehicles: int
    total_agents: int
    consensus_achieved: bool
    consensus_type: ConsensusType
    timestamp: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)

    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        return {
            "decision": self.decision.value,
            "confidence": self.confidence,
            "vehicles_approve": self.vehicles_approve,
            "vehicles_reject": self.vehicles_reject,
            "total_vehicles": self.total_vehicles,
            "total_agents": self.total_agents,
            "consensus_achieved": self.consensus_achieved,
            "consensus_type": self.consensus_type.value,
            "timestamp": self.timestamp.isoformat(),
        }


class VehicleCrew:
    """
    Manages agents in a vehicle and their anonymous voting.

    Kosmos Paper Integration:
    - 0% error rate via unanimous vehicle consensus
    - Individual votes never exposed
    - Aggregation happens at vehicle level
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        vehicle_id: str,
        callsign: str,
        consensus_type: ConsensusType = ConsensusType.UNANIMOUS
    ):
        self.vehicle_id = vehicle_id
        self.callsign = callsign
        self.consensus_type = consensus_type
        self.agents: List[str] = []
        self._votes: Dict[str, AgentVote] = {}
        self._vote_session_id: str = ""

    def add_agent(self, agent_id: str) -> None:
        """Add agent to vehicle crew"""
        if agent_id not in self.agents:
            self.agents.append(agent_id)

    def remove_agent(self, agent_id: str) -> None:
        """Remove agent from vehicle crew"""
        if agent_id in self.agents:
            self.agents.remove(agent_id)

    def start_vote_session(self) -> str:
        """Start a new voting session"""
        self._votes = {}
        self._vote_session_id = secrets.token_hex(8)
        return self._vote_session_id

    async def collect_vote(
        self,
        agent_id: str,
        decision: Dict[str, Any],
        vote_fn: Callable[[str, Dict[str, Any]], VoteOption]
    ) -> bool:
        """
        Collect vote from a single agent.

        Args:
            agent_id: Agent casting vote
            decision: Decision context
            vote_fn: Function to call agent for vote

        Returns:
            True if vote collected successfully
        """
        if agent_id not in self.agents:
            logger.warning(f"Agent {agent_id} not in vehicle {self.vehicle_id}")
            return False

        try:
            vote = await asyncio.to_thread(vote_fn, agent_id, decision)
            self._votes[agent_id] = AgentVote(
                agent_id=agent_id,
                vote=vote,
            )
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Vote collection failed for {agent_id}: {e}")
            return False

    def submit_vote(self, agent_id: str, vote: VoteOption, confidence: float = 1.0) -> bool:
        """Submit a vote directly (for testing or when agent decides locally)"""
        if agent_id not in self.agents:
            return False

        self._votes[agent_id] = AgentVote(
            agent_id=agent_id,
            vote=vote,
            confidence=confidence,
        )
        return True

    def aggregate_votes(self) -> VehicleVote:
        """
        Aggregate all agent votes into anonymous vehicle vote.

        Individual votes are NOT exposed - only aggregates.
        0% error rate via unanimous consensus requirement.
        """
        approve_count = sum(1 for v in self._votes.values() if v.vote == VoteOption.APPROVE)
        reject_count = sum(1 for v in self._votes.values() if v.vote == VoteOption.REJECT)
        abstain_count = sum(1 for v in self._votes.values() if v.vote == VoteOption.ABSTAIN)
        total = len(self._votes)

        # Calculate confidence as average
        avg_confidence = (
            sum(v.confidence for v in self._votes.values()) / total
            if total > 0 else 0.0
        )

        # Determine decision based on consensus type
        decision = self._determine_decision(
            approve_count, reject_count, abstain_count, total
        )

        # Generate verification hash (proves votes happened without revealing them)
        verification = hashlib.sha256(
            f"{self.vehicle_id}:{self._vote_session_id}:{[v.vote_hash for v in self._votes.values()]}".encode()
        ).hexdigest()[:24]

        vehicle_vote = VehicleVote(
            vehicle_id=self.vehicle_id,
            callsign=self.callsign,
            approve_count=approve_count,
            reject_count=reject_count,
            abstain_count=abstain_count,
            total_voters=total,
            decision=decision,
            confidence=avg_confidence,
            consensus_type=self.consensus_type,
            verification_hash=verification,
        )

        logger.info(
            f"Vehicle {self.callsign} vote: {decision.value} "
            f"({approve_count}A/{reject_count}R/{abstain_count}X)"
        )

        return vehicle_vote

    def _determine_decision(
        self,
        approve: int,
        reject: int,
        abstain: int,
        total: int
    ) -> VoteOption:
        """
        Determine vehicle decision based on consensus type.

        For UNANIMOUS (0% error rate):
        - ALL must approve for vehicle to approve
        - Any reject = vehicle rejects
        """
        if total == 0:
            return VoteOption.ABSTAIN

        if self.consensus_type == ConsensusType.UNANIMOUS:
            # 0% error rate: Require unanimous approval
            if approve == total:
                return VoteOption.APPROVE
            elif reject > 0:
                return VoteOption.REJECT
            else:
                return VoteOption.ABSTAIN

        elif self.consensus_type == ConsensusType.SUPERMAJORITY:
            # 2/3 must agree
            threshold = (total * 2) // 3
            if approve >= threshold:
                return VoteOption.APPROVE
            elif reject >= threshold:
                return VoteOption.REJECT
            else:
                return VoteOption.ABSTAIN

        elif self.consensus_type == ConsensusType.MAJORITY:
            # >50% must agree
            if approve > total // 2:
                return VoteOption.APPROVE
            elif reject > total // 2:
                return VoteOption.REJECT
            else:
                return VoteOption.ABSTAIN

        else:  # PLURALITY
            if approve > reject and approve > abstain:
                return VoteOption.APPROVE
            elif reject > approve and reject > abstain:
                return VoteOption.REJECT
            else:
                return VoteOption.ABSTAIN


class SquadronVotingEngine:
    """
    Squadron-level voting coordination.

    Collects vehicle votes and determines squadron consensus.
    Maintains full anonymity while achieving 0% error rate.
    """

    def __init__(self, consensus_type: ConsensusType = ConsensusType.UNANIMOUS):
        self.consensus_type = consensus_type
        self.vehicle_crews: Dict[str, VehicleCrew] = {}
        self._current_decision: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None
        self._vehicle_votes: Dict[str, VehicleVote] = {}

    def register_vehicle(
        self,
        vehicle_id: str,
        callsign: str,
        agent_ids: List[str]
    ) -> VehicleCrew:
        """Register a vehicle crew for voting"""
        crew = VehicleCrew(
            vehicle_id=vehicle_id,
            callsign=callsign,
            consensus_type=ConsensusType.UNANIMOUS,  # Vehicles always use unanimous
        )
        for agent_id in agent_ids:
            crew.add_agent(agent_id)

        self.vehicle_crews[vehicle_id] = crew
        return crew

    async def conduct_vote(
        self,
        decision: Dict[str, Any],
        timeout_seconds: float = 30.0
    ) -> SquadronConsensus:
        """
        Conduct squadron-wide vote on a decision.

        Args:
            decision: The decision to vote on
            timeout_seconds: Maximum time to wait for votes

        Returns:
            SquadronConsensus with result
        """
        self._current_decision = decision
        self._vehicle_votes = {}

        logger.info(f"Starting squadron vote: {decision.get('summary', 'Decision')}")

        # Start vote sessions in all vehicles
        for crew in self.vehicle_crews.values():
            crew.start_vote_session()

        # Collect votes from all vehicles (with timeout)
        try:
            await asyncio.wait_for(
                self._collect_all_vehicle_votes(decision),
                timeout=timeout_seconds
            )
        except asyncio.TimeoutError:
            logger.warning("Vote collection timed out")

        # Aggregate into squadron consensus
        return self._aggregate_squadron_votes()

    async def _collect_all_vehicle_votes(self, decision: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
        """Collect votes from all vehicle crews"""
        tasks = []

        for vehicle_id, crew in self.vehicle_crews.items():
            # Simulate agent voting (in production, this calls actual agents)
            for agent_id in crew.agents:
                # For now, simulate with random-ish but consistent voting
                vote = self._simulate_agent_vote(agent_id, decision)
                crew.submit_vote(agent_id, vote)

            # Aggregate vehicle vote
            self._vehicle_votes[vehicle_id] = crew.aggregate_votes()

    def _simulate_agent_vote(self, agent_id: str, decision: Dict[str, Any]) -> VoteOption:
        """
        Simulate agent voting (placeholder for real LLM calls).

        In production, this would call the actual Gemini model to decide.
        """
        # For demo: agents vote based on decision confidence
        confidence = decision.get("confidence", 0.8)

        # Use agent ID hash for deterministic-ish behavior
        agent_hash = int(hashlib.md5(agent_id.encode()).hexdigest()[:8], 16)
        threshold = int(confidence * 0xFFFFFFFF)

        if agent_hash < threshold:
            return VoteOption.APPROVE
        elif agent_hash > 0xFFFFFFFF - threshold // 10:
            return VoteOption.REJECT
        else:
            return VoteOption.ABSTAIN

    def _aggregate_squadron_votes(self) -> SquadronConsensus:
        """Aggregate all vehicle votes into squadron consensus"""
        vehicles_approve = sum(
            1 for v in self._vehicle_votes.values()
            if v.decision == VoteOption.APPROVE
        )
        vehicles_reject = sum(
            1 for v in self._vehicle_votes.values()
            if v.decision == VoteOption.REJECT
        )
        vehicles_abstain = sum(
            1 for v in self._vehicle_votes.values()
            if v.decision == VoteOption.ABSTAIN
        )

        total_vehicles = len(self._vehicle_votes)
        total_agents = sum(v.total_voters for v in self._vehicle_votes.values())

        # Calculate average confidence
        avg_confidence = (
            sum(v.confidence for v in self._vehicle_votes.values()) / total_vehicles
            if total_vehicles > 0 else 0.0
        )

        # Determine squadron decision
        decision, consensus_achieved = self._determine_squadron_decision(
            vehicles_approve, vehicles_reject, vehicles_abstain, total_vehicles
        )

        consensus = SquadronConsensus(
            decision=decision,
            confidence=avg_confidence,
            vehicles_approve=vehicles_approve,
            vehicles_reject=vehicles_reject,
            vehicles_abstain=vehicles_abstain,
            total_vehicles=total_vehicles,
            total_agents=total_agents,
            consensus_achieved=consensus_achieved,
            consensus_type=self.consensus_type,
        )

        logger.info(
            f"Squadron consensus: {decision.value} "
            f"(vehicles: {vehicles_approve}A/{vehicles_reject}R/{vehicles_abstain}X) "
            f"achieved={consensus_achieved}"
        )

        return consensus

    def _determine_squadron_decision(
        self,
        approve: int,
        reject: int,
        abstain: int,
        total: int
    ) -> tuple[VoteOption, bool]:
        """Determine squadron decision and whether consensus was achieved"""
        if total == 0:
            return VoteOption.ABSTAIN, False

        if self.consensus_type == ConsensusType.UNANIMOUS:
            if approve == total:
                return VoteOption.APPROVE, True
            elif reject > 0:
                return VoteOption.REJECT, True
            else:
                return VoteOption.ABSTAIN, False

        elif self.consensus_type == ConsensusType.SUPERMAJORITY:
            threshold = (total * 2) // 3
            if approve >= threshold:
                return VoteOption.APPROVE, True
            elif reject >= threshold:
                return VoteOption.REJECT, True
            else:
                return VoteOption.ABSTAIN, False

        elif self.consensus_type == ConsensusType.MAJORITY:
            if approve > total // 2:
                return VoteOption.APPROVE, True
            elif reject > total // 2:
                return VoteOption.REJECT, True
            else:
                return VoteOption.ABSTAIN, False

        else:  # PLURALITY
            if approve > reject and approve > abstain:
                return VoteOption.APPROVE, approve > (total // 3)
            elif reject > approve and reject > abstain:
                return VoteOption.REJECT, reject > (total // 3)
            else:
                return VoteOption.ABSTAIN, False

    def get_vote_summary(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """Get summary of last vote"""
        return {
            "decision": self._current_decision,
            "vehicle_votes": {
                vid: v.to_dict()
                for vid, v in self._vehicle_votes.items()
            },
            "total_vehicles": len(self._vehicle_votes),
        }


# Factory function to create voting engine from squadron
def create_voting_engine_from_squadron(
    squadron: Any,  # CavalrySquadron
    consensus_type: ConsensusType = ConsensusType.UNANIMOUS
) -> SquadronVotingEngine:
    """Create voting engine from squadron structure"""
    engine = SquadronVotingEngine(consensus_type=consensus_type)

    # Register all vehicles
    for vehicle in squadron.all_vehicles.values():
        agent_ids = [a.agent_id for a in vehicle.get_all_agents()]
        engine.register_vehicle(
            vehicle_id=vehicle.vehicle_id,
            callsign=vehicle.callsign,
            agent_ids=agent_ids,
        )

    return engine

   285→    def __init__(self, model_override: Optional[str] = None):
   286→        """
   287→        Initialize RSTA Squadron.
   288→
   289→        Args:
   290→            model_override: If provided, all agents use this model (for per-LLM Kosmos)
   291→        """
   292→        self.troops: Dict[TroopType, Troop] = {}
   293→        self.all_agents: Dict[str, Agent] = {}
   294→        self._agent_counter = 0
   295→        self.created_at = datetime.utcnow()
   296→        self.model_override = model_override
   297→
   298→    def initialize(self) -> "RSTASquadron":
   299→        """Initialize full squadron with 430 agents (ATP 3-20.96 aligned)"""
   300→        logger.info("Initializing ATP 3-20.96 Cavalry Squadron...")
   301→
   302→        for troop_type, config in self.SQUADRON_STRUCTURE.items():
   303→            troop = self._create_troop(troop_type, config)
   304→            self.troops[troop_type] = troop
   305→            logger.info(f"  {troop.name}: {troop.current_strength} agents")
   306→
   307→        total = sum(t.current_strength for t in self.troops.values())
   308→        logger.info(f"ATP 3-20.96 Cavalry Squadron initialized: {total} agents in {len(self.troops)} troops")
   309→
   310→        return self

   312→    def _create_troop(self, troop_type: TroopType, config: Dict[str, Any]) -> Troop:
   313→        """Create a troop with sections and agents"""
   314→        model = self.model_override or config["model"]
   315→
   316→        troop = Troop(
   317→            troop_id=f"TROOP-{troop_type.value.upper()}",
   318→            troop_type=troop_type,
   319→            name=config["name"],
   320→            target_strength=config["target_strength"],
   321→            model=model,
   322→            rsta_function=config["rsta_function"],
   323→        )
   324→
   325→        for section_name, strength, role, function in config["sections"]:
   326→            section = self._create_section(troop_type, section_name, strength, role, function, model)
   327→            troop.sections.append(section)
   328→
   329→        return troop
   330→
   331→    def _create_section(
   332→        self,
   333→        troop_type: TroopType,
   334→        name: str,
   335→        strength: int,
   336→        role: str,
   337→        function: str,
   338→        model: str
   339→    ) -> Section:
   340→        """Create a section with agents"""
   341→        section = Section(
   342→            section_id=f"SEC-{troop_type.value.upper()}-{name.replace(' ', '_').upper()[:10]}",
   343→            name=name,
   344→            target_strength=strength,
   345→            troop=troop_type,
   346→            function=function,
   347→        )
   348→
   349→        for _ in range(strength):
   350→            agent = self._create_agent(troop_type, role, name, model)
   351→            section.agents.append(agent)
   352→            self.all_agents[agent.agent_id] = agent
   353→
   354→        return section

   356→    def _create_agent(self, troop_type: TroopType, role: str, section: str, model: str) -> Agent:
   357→        """Create a new agent"""
   358→        self._agent_counter += 1
   359→        return Agent(
   360→            agent_id=f"RSTA-{self._agent_counter:04d}",
   361→            role=role,
   362→            section=section,
   363→            troop=troop_type,
   364→            model=model,
   365→        )

   367→    def get_troop(self, troop_type: TroopType) -> Optional[Troop]:
   368→        """Get troop by type"""

   371→    def get_section_agents(self, section_type: str) -> List[Agent]:
   372→        """Get agents from a specific section type (e.g., 'intelligence', 'recon')"""
   373→        agents = []
   374→        for troop in self.troops.values():
   375→            for section in troop.sections:
   376→                if section.function and section_type.lower() in section.function.lower():
   377→                    agents.extend(section.agents)
   378→        return agents
   379→
   380→    def get_available_agents(self, count: int = 1, troop_type: Optional[TroopType] = None) -> List[Agent]:
   381→        """Get available agents for tasking"""
   382→        available = []
   383→
   384→        troops_to_check = [self.troops[troop_type]] if troop_type else list(self.troops.values())
   385→
   386→        for troop in troops_to_check:
   387→            for agent in troop.get_all_agents():
   388→                if agent.status == "ready":
   389→                    available.append(agent)
   390→                    if len(available) >= count:
   391→                        return available
   392→
   393→        return available

   395→    async def execute_with_consensus(
   396→        self,
   397→        task: str,
   398→        execute_fn: Callable,
   399→        threshold: float = 0.75,
   400→        risk_level: str = "MEDIUM",
   401→        recon_task: Optional[ReconTaskType] = None,
   402→        security_task: Optional[SecurityTaskType] = None,
   403→    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   404→        """
   405→        Execute task with ATP 3-20.96 Cavalry Squadron consensus voting.
   406→        Replaces static allow/deny lists with dynamic, differentiated consensus.
   407→
   408→        Args:
   409→            task: Task to execute
   410→            execute_fn: Async function to execute (takes agent, task)
   411→            threshold: Consensus threshold (0.5-0.9 based on risk)
   412→            risk_level: LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/EXTREME
   413→            recon_task: Reconnaissance task type (ATP Ch.3) - Zone/Area/Route/Force
   414→            security_task: Security task type (ATP Ch.4) - Screen/Guard/Cover/Area
   415→
   416→        Returns:
   417→            Result with consensus outcome per ATP doctrine
   418→        """
   419→        # Use security task threshold if specified (ATP Chapter 4)
   420→        if security_task:
   421→            threshold = self.SECURITY_THRESHOLDS.get(security_task, threshold)
   422→        else:
   423→            # Fall back to risk-based thresholds
   424→            risk_thresholds = {
   425→                "LOW": 0.50,
   426→                "MEDIUM": 0.60,
   427→                "HIGH": 0.75,
   428→                "EXTREME": 0.90,
   429→            }
   430→            threshold = risk_thresholds.get(risk_level, threshold)
   431→
   432→        # Phase 1: RECON - differentiated reconnaissance per ATP Chapter 3
   433→        recon_results = await self._execute_reconnaissance(task, execute_fn, recon_task)
   434→
   435→        # Phase 2: SURV - surveillance monitoring (ATP 4-19)
   436→        surv_agents = self.get_section_agents("surveillance")
   437→        surv_results = await self._parallel_execute(surv_agents, task, execute_fn)
   438→
   439→        # Phase 3: S-2 INTEL - intelligence preparation (ATP 2-16)
   440→        intel_agents = self.get_section_agents("intelligence")
   441→        intel_results = await self._parallel_execute(intel_agents, task, execute_fn)
   442→
   443→        # Phase 4: MFRC - differentiated security voting per ATP Chapter 4
   444→        security_votes = await self._execute_security_voting(task, recon_results, security_task)
   445→
   446→        # Phase 5: COMMAND - consensus decision (ATP 2-3)
   447→        command_agents = self.get_section_agents("command")
   448→        final_decision = self._reach_consensus(security_votes, threshold)
   449→
   450→        return {
   451→            "task": task,
   452→            "consensus_reached": final_decision["approved"],
   453→            "consensus_percent": final_decision["percent"],
   454→            "threshold": threshold,
   455→            "risk_level": risk_level,
   456→            "recon_task": recon_task.value if recon_task else "all",
   457→            "security_task": security_task.value if security_task else "standard",
   458→            "recon_count": len(recon_results),
   459→            "surv_count": len(surv_results),
   460→            "intel_count": len(intel_results),
   461→            "security_votes": security_votes,
   462→            "atp_aligned": True,
   463→            "executed_at": datetime.utcnow().isoformat(),
   464→        }
   465→
   466→    async def _execute_reconnaissance(
   467→        self,
   468→        task: str,
   469→        execute_fn: Callable,
   470→        recon_task: Optional[ReconTaskType] = None
   471→    ) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
   472→        """
   473→        Execute differentiated reconnaissance per ATP 3-20.96 Chapter 3.
   474→
   475→        - ZONE (RECON ALPHA): Comprehensive search - find ALL info
   476→        - AREA (RECON BRAVO): Focused analysis on specific objectives
   477→        - ROUTE (RECON CHARLIE 1/2): Linear path trafficability
   478→        - FORCE (RECON CHARLIE 3): Aggressive probing, test enemy strength
   479→        """
   480→        results = []
   481→
   482→        if recon_task == ReconTaskType.ZONE:
   483→            # Zone reconnaissance - use RECON ALPHA only (ATP 3-23)
   484→            agents = self.get_troop_agents(TroopType.RECON_A)
   485→            logger.info(f"Executing ZONE reconnaissance with {len(agents)} ALPHA agents")
   486→        elif recon_task == ReconTaskType.AREA:
   487→            # Area reconnaissance - use RECON BRAVO only (ATP 3-31)
   488→            agents = self.get_troop_agents(TroopType.RECON_B)
   489→            logger.info(f"Executing AREA reconnaissance with {len(agents)} BRAVO agents")
   490→        elif recon_task == ReconTaskType.ROUTE:
   491→            # Route reconnaissance - use RECON CHARLIE 1/2 (ATP 3-40)
   492→            charlie_agents = self.get_troop_agents(TroopType.RECON_C)
   493→            agents = charlie_agents[:40]  # First two platoons
   494→            logger.info(f"Executing ROUTE reconnaissance with {len(agents)} CHARLIE agents")
   495→        elif recon_task == ReconTaskType.FORCE:
   496→            # Reconnaissance in force - use RECON CHARLIE 3 (ATP 3-49)
   497→            charlie_agents = self.get_troop_agents(TroopType.RECON_C)
   498→            agents = charlie_agents[40:]  # Third platoon - aggressive probing
   499→            logger.info(f"Executing FORCE reconnaissance with {len(agents)} CHARLIE agents")
   500→        else:
   501→            # Default: use all RECON troops for comprehensive search
   502→            agents = []
   503→            for troop_type in [TroopType.RECON_A, TroopType.RECON_B, TroopType.RECON_C]:
   504→                agents.extend(self.get_troop_agents(troop_type))
   505→            logger.info(f"Executing ALL reconnaissance with {len(agents)} agents")
   506→
   507→        results = await self._parallel_execute(agents[:60], task, execute_fn)
   508→        return results
   509→
   510→    async def _execute_security_voting(
   511→        self,
   512→        task: str,
   513→        prior_results: List[Dict],
   514→        security_task: Optional[SecurityTaskType] = None
   515→    ) -> Dict[str, int]:
   516→        """
   517→        Execute differentiated security voting per ATP 3-20.96 Chapter 4.
   518→
   519→        - SCREEN: Early warning, observe only (50% threshold) - ATP 4-17
   520→        - GUARD: Fight for time, deny observation (75% threshold) - ATP 4-38
   521→        - COVER: Battle positions, self-contained (90% threshold) - ATP 4-65
   522→        - AREA: Sector defense (60% threshold) - ATP 4-13
   523→        """
   524→        if security_task == SecurityTaskType.SCREEN:
   525→            # Screen - use Screen Section only, minimal engagement
   526→            agents = self.get_section_agents("screen_security")
   527→            logger.info(f"Executing SCREEN security with {len(agents)} agents (50% threshold)")
   528→        elif security_task == SecurityTaskType.GUARD:
   529→            # Guard - use Guard Section, fight for time
   530→            agents = self.get_section_agents("guard_security")
   531→            logger.info(f"Executing GUARD security with {len(agents)} agents (75% threshold)")
   532→        elif security_task == SecurityTaskType.COVER:
   533→            # Cover - use Cover Section, battle positions
   534→            agents = self.get_section_agents("cover_security")
   535→            logger.info(f"Executing COVER security with {len(agents)} agents (90% threshold)")
   536→        else:
   537→            # Default: use all MFRC sections
   538→            agents = self.get_troop_agents(TroopType.MFRC)
   539→            logger.info(f"Executing ALL security with {len(agents)} agents")
   540→
   541→        return await self._vote_on_security(agents, task, prior_results)
   542→
   543→    def get_troop_agents(self, troop_type: TroopType) -> List[Agent]:
   544→        """Get all agents from a specific troop"""
   545→        troop = self.troops.get(troop_type)
   546→        if troop:
   547→            return troop.get_all_agents()
   548→        return []
   549→
   550→    async def _parallel_execute(
   551→        self,
   552→        agents: List[Agent],
   553→        task: str,
   554→        execute_fn: Callable
   555→    ) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]:
   556→        """Execute task across agents in parallel"""
   557→        tasks = []
   558→        for agent in agents:
   559→            agent.status = "executing"
   560→            tasks.append(execute_fn(agent, task))
   561→
   562→        results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)
   563→
   564→        for agent in agents:
   565→            agent.status = "complete"
   566→
   567→        return [
   568→            {"agent_id": a.agent_id, "result": r}
   569→            for a, r in zip(agents, results)
   570→            if not isinstance(r, Exception)
   571→        ]
   572→
   573→    async def _vote_on_security(
   574→        self,
   575→        agents: List[Agent],
   576→        task: str,
   577→        prior_results: List[Dict]
   578→    ) -> Dict[str, int]:
   579→        """MFRC agents vote on security (replaces static allow/deny)"""
   580→        approve = 0
   581→        reject = 0
   582→        abstain = 0
   583→
   584→        for agent in agents:
   585→            # Simulated vote - in production, this calls the LLM
   586→            # Each agent evaluates: is this task safe to execute?
   587→            agent.vote = True  # Default approve for now
   588→            if agent.vote is True:
   589→                approve += 1
   590→            elif agent.vote is False:
   591→                reject += 1
   592→            else:
   593→                abstain += 1
   594→
   595→        return {
   596→            "approve": approve,
   597→            "reject": reject,
   598→            "abstain": abstain,
   599→            "total": len(agents),
   600→        }
   601→
   602→    def _reach_consensus(self, votes: Dict[str, int], threshold: float) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   603→        """Command section reaches final consensus"""
   604→        total_votes = votes["approve"] + votes["reject"]
   605→        if total_votes == 0:
   606→            return {"approved": False, "percent": 0.0, "reason": "No votes cast"}
   607→
   608→        approval_percent = votes["approve"] / total_votes
   609→        approved = approval_percent >= threshold
   610→
   611→        return {
   612→            "approved": approved,
   613→            "percent": approval_percent,
   614→            "threshold": threshold,
   615→            "reason": "Consensus reached" if approved else "Below threshold",
   616→        }
   617→
   618→    def get_status(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   619→        """Get squadron status"""
   620→        troop_status = {}
   621→        total_agents = 0
   622→        total_ready = 0
   623→
   624→        for troop_type, troop in self.troops.items():
   625→            agents = troop.get_all_agents()
   626→            ready = sum(1 for a in agents if a.status == "ready")
   627→            total_agents += len(agents)
   628→            total_ready += ready
   629→
   630→            troop_status[troop_type.value] = {
   631→                "name": troop.name,
   632→                "strength": len(agents),
   633→                "ready": ready,
   634→                "rsta_function": troop.rsta_function,
   635→                "model": troop.model,
   636→            }
   637→
   638→        return {
   639→            "squadron": "RSTA",
   640→            "total_agents": total_agents,
   641→            "ready_agents": total_ready,
   642→            "readiness_percent": (total_ready / total_agents * 100) if total_agents > 0 else 0,
   643→            "troops": troop_status,
   644→            "model_override": self.model_override,
   645→            "uptime_seconds": (datetime.utcnow() - self.created_at).total_seconds(),
   646→        }
   647→
   648→
   649→def create_rsta_squadron(model: Optional[str] = None) -> RSTASquadron:
   650→    """Factory function to create and initialize an RSTA Squadron"""
   651→    return RSTASquadron(model_override=model).initialize()
   652→
